Position: Application Engineer

Location: Austin

Who we are: Atom is a global investment platform that unifies industry-leading investment talent with systematic portfolio construction and disciplined risk management. Our technology foundation is composed of advanced proprietary systems that capture and analyze petabytes of data to inform every step of our investment process. At the same time, our live mission control architecture validates millions of check-points and orchestrates around-the-clock trading and operational processes with precision.

Role

The individual will report directly to the CTO and independently own key projects from inception to production. This is an opportunity to join a lean team and have immediate personal impact while learning from industry experts in Technology, Trading, Risk, and many other specializations.

Technologies We Use and Teach:

Primary: Python, JavaScript
Frontend: React, Material UI
Infrastructure: Docker, NGINX
Cloud: AWS stack
Databases: MSSQL, Redis

Responsibilities:

Own the architecture, implementation, and maintenance of new software applications in close collaboration with Atom's leadership team
Drive tangible impact through a technology-enabled understanding of usage metrics and user activation
Master the science of presenting complex data analysis using intuitive, user-friendly visualization techniques
Grow your software development skills using Functional and Object-Oriented principles
Work as part of an engineering team to enhance and further optimize a sophisticated suite of complex software systems

Ideal Candidate

2+ years professional software engineering experience
Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or related field
Experience with Python, JavaScript, or equivalent languages
Experience in modern front-end technologies
Experience with API design and development
Understanding of software engineering best practices
Ability to articulate complexity in linear, digestible, audience-appropriate language
